title: Breaking into Impel Down
main_description: Luffy infiltrates Impel Down and moves through the prison with unlikely allies. The chapter mainly follows Luffy, Ace, Buggy, Mr. 3, Mr. 2 Bon Clay, Magellan, keeping the focus on the Impel Down storyline.
key_events: Breaking into Impel Down: Rising Conflict
Breaking into Impel Down: Key Exchange
Breaking into Impel Down: Turning Point
